# Resume Parser Ai MCP

> Parse resumes to extract skills, match against jobs, and score candidates

`resume-parser-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install resume-parser-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx resume-parser-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `parse_resume` — Parse resume text and extract structured information: contact, skills, education, experience.
- `extract_skills` — Extract and categorize all skills from resume text with proficiency estimates.
- `match_job` — Match a resume against job requirements and return a compatibility report.
- `score_resume` — Score a resume on completeness, formatting indicators, and content quality (0-100).

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/resume-parser-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/resume-parser-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
